content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.x402.server
FILE: cosmos/integration/x402/server.py (228 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: x402 Server Middleware.

FastAPI middleware to gate endpoints with x402 micropayments.

CLASSES:
- X402PaymentGate(BaseHTTPMiddleware): FastAPI middleware that gates endpoints with x402 payments.

Add to FastAPI app:
  Methods: async def dispatch(self, request: Request, call_next) -> Response
- PaymentTracker: Track received payments for analytics.
  Methods: def record_payment(self, endpoint: str, amount: Decimal, payer: str=None, tx_hash: str=None)
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def x402_required(price: Decimal=None)
